x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluation of borrower default.

Includes:
Borrower creditworthiness analysis
Credit scoring & rating models
Debt-to-income ratio analysis
Collateral evaluation
Probability of Default (PD)
Loss Given Default (LGD)
Non-Performing Loan (NPL) ratio

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Risk of losses due to market price changes.

Includes:
Interest rate risk
Foreign exchange risk
Equity price risk
Commodity price risk
Value at Risk (VaR) calculation
Stress testing

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Risk that the bank cannot meet short-term obligations.

Includes:
Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR)
Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR)
Cash flow gap analysis
Funding concentration risk
Contingency funding plan review

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Risk from internal process or system failures.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Strategic Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Risk arising from adverse business decisions
